text:
Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates the presence of "Other and unspecified hyperlipidemia" (ICD9-DX:2740). This diagnosis is a clear indication of a lipid disorder, which falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." Given that this condition is explicitly documented, it is reasonable to predict that the patient will have a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" coded in their next hospital visit, as the presence of hyperlipidemia suggests ongoing management and monitoring of lipid levels.
